subcodes.title: Address to the readers of The Christian Commonwealth, Jan. 1913
subcodes.first_line: The Lord of all mankind hath fashioned this human realm to be a Garden of Eden, an earthly paradise.
subcodes.first_line_orig: خداوند عالمیان عالم انسانی را جنت عدن خلق فرموده اگر صلح و سلام و محبت و وفا
subcodes.subjects: @war and peace, @contention and conflict, @love and unity, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @Adam; Adam and Eve
